description: EU Council list of non-cooperative jurisdictions for tax purposes (Annex I). Refreshed semi-annually by ECOFIN Council Conclusions. Used by SFDR criterion 2 Domain D (tax compliance) to screen the developer-entity's footprint.
source: ECOFIN Council Conclusions on the revised EU list of non-cooperative jurisdictions for tax purposes, 17 February 2026 (Council document 5869/26, ECOFIN 132).
verification_note: Last verified at the date above against the published Council Conclusions; this list refreshes ~twice yearly (February and October cycles). Before any production engagement, re-verify against the most recent ECOFIN Conclusions and refresh last_verified.
